name: Native Document Generator
description: Natively generates rich Office documents (.pptx, .docx). You MUST pass 'path' as an absolute path and 'content' as a JSON string. For PPT, 'content' must be an array of objects: [{'title': 'Slide 1', 'content': ['Point 1', 'Point 2']}]. For Word, 'content' must be: [{'heading': '...', 'paragraphs': ['...']}].

path.description: Absolute path including filename and extension, e.g. C:\Users\...\Desktop\presentation.pptx

content.description: A JSON-escaped string containing the structured document outline.
